title: MultiModel Dev OS Feedback and Learnings Schema
description: Schema for capturing developer corrections and instructions overrides to refine subsequent agent proposal generations.

id.description: Unique UUID or tag for the learning item.

context.description: Topic or architectural tier (e.g. styling, db-migrations, testing).

pattern.description: File path pattern or glob rules matching this learning directive.

rule.description: The exact instructional rule to append to the agent context.

rejection_reason.description: Developer comment or description of the rejected behavior.
